channel.title: Chapter 20: Data Science Lifecycle on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)
channel.description: Recent content in Chapter 20: Data Science Lifecycle on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)

item.title: Chapter 20.01: The Data Science Lifecycle
item.description: We introduce the main phases of the data science lifecycle and identify essential concepts, tools, and methods for each phase.

item.title: Chapter 20.02: ML Competition Strategy
item.description: We present a 10-step workflow for ML competitions, covering how to plan an end-to-end ML workflow with attention to constraints and dependencies.
